vision.visual_reason: Two people with identifiable faces dominate the foreground, clinking cocktail glasses at a marble bar; the venue space is visible in the background but people are the primary subject.

Polished marble bar counter with upholstered barstools, mirrored shelving with potted plants, white tablecloth dining area, and a person in the background; warm lighting and elegant finishes indicate an upscale restaurant interior.
Two people in white bathrobes on a balcony with glass railing, city skyline visible in the background, holding yellow drinks. Bright natural daylight, scenic view, well-composed.

Close-up of a cooked steak on a black sizzling plate with microgreens garnish, being cut with a knife and fork; hands visible but not identifiable faces; dark table setting with blurred glasses in background, focused on the food product.
Ornate, well-lit building facade with detailed floral relief carvings, arched entryways, and a hanging 'Social Paraiso Bistro' sign, captured from a low angle at dusk.

Dimly lit interior with prominent neon sign 'TRADITION & REBELLION' on a wall; multiple people seated at a table in the foreground holding glasses, with industrial scaffolding/structure visible in the background. Faces are visible but not the primary focus.
Clear, well-lit rooftop restaurant/bar interior with retractable glass ceiling, bar area with bottles, and ample wooden tables and pink chairs. Spacious and inviting.
Predominantly black frame with a small ceramic cup illuminated only on the right side; no discernible venue interior, layout, or spatial context visible.
Close-up of a single ribbed glass lamp against a black background with a thin horizontal line; no spatial context or venue features visible.
Close-up portrait of a single person dominates the frame; the background shows only patterned wallpaper and a striped upholstered chair, with no clear view of the venue's overall interior space.

Close-up of three coupe glasses with lemon-peel garnished cocktails on a bar tray, with a person's black shirt (partially visible text) blurred in the background. Focus is on the drinks, not the venue space.
Night exterior of a corner venue named 'La Carbonera' with illuminated facade, cobblestone intersection, and light trails from passing cars creating a moody urban atmosphere.

Top-down close-up of a sesame bagel sandwich with cheese and ham, alongside a latte with rosetta art, served on a tray on a wooden table. Only food, drink, and table surface are visible; no venue space or people shown.
Close-up of a croissant and a latte on a tray on a wooden table; no spatial context of the venue is visible.

Well-lit interior of a small cafe/coffee shop with industrial-style exposed pipe pendant lighting, wooden counter, yellow metal stools, round wooden tables with black metal chairs, dark teal wall with shelves, and a bench with coffee sack cushions. Clear spatial composition suitable as a hero image.
Close-up of two sandwich halves on white plates on a wooden table; food dominates the frame with only a blurred yellow chair and partial person visible in the background.
Close-up of food and drinks on a marble table; no significant venue interior or spatial context visible.
Close-up of a plate with scrambled eggs, tomatoes, avocado, bread, and coffee dominates the foreground; the cafe interior is visible in the background but out of focus and secondary to the food.
Close-up of a pink beverage in a glass and pitcher alongside a whipped-cream-topped dessert on a branded plate; no interior space, people, or venue features visible.
Close-up overhead shot of a coffee cup with foam, a glass of water, and two croissants on a plate on a dark table; no spatial context of the venue is shown.
Clear interior view of a coffee shop counter with exposed distressed concrete walls, espresso machine, pastry display case, coffee grinders, plants, and a barista working behind the counter.
Close-up of a sandwich on a plate, iced drinks, and a slice of cake on a black table; no venue interior or spatial context is visible, just food and drink items.
Overhead shot focused on coffee, pastries, and a sandwich on a round table; no broader venue interior is visible.
Top-down close-up of coffee, iced matcha, croissant and cookie on a table; only the surface is visible, no venue space shown.
Close-up of bread, jam, cream, and a latte on a wooden table; background retail shelves and cactus are blurred and out of focus.
Top-down view of two coffee cups, pastries (cinnamon roll and pain au chocolat), water glasses, and a sugar jar on a black round table; no venue interior or exterior is visible.

Interior of a cafe/gourmet shop with wooden tables, upholstered chairs, shelving with packaged goods, and decorative mirror. Composition is obstructed by a large foreground table edge, and seated patrons are visible from behind, making it unsuitable as a clean hero image but useful for atmosphere.

Clear interior of a cafe/shop with wooden dining table, chairs, retail shelves, glass display case, botanical wall mural, pendant lighting, and tiled floor; well-lit and in focus with no people dominating the frame.

Interior view of a coffee shop with a prominent espresso machine, grinder, pendant lighting, display case with baked goods, and shelving with jars and merchandise. Warm lighting and wooden counter convey a cozy atmosphere.
Close-up of a hand pouring a beverage from a metal pitcher into an iced glass, with a blurred pastry in the background. Tight framing on the drink and pouring action, not the venue space.

Clear interior view of a specialty coffee shop featuring a large grid shelving unit with curated products, pendant lights, a La Marzocco espresso machine, pegboard wall with tools, and a wooden bar counter with pastries; industrial-chic aesthetic with exposed ceiling beams and pipes.
Close-up overhead shot of three lattes with latte art and three pastries/buns on branded trays, with no visible venue space or architecture.

Interior of a cafe/coffee shop with industrial concrete walls, distinctive copper pendant lights, large windows, wooden tables and chairs, and decorative greenery with neon sign. Multiple patrons are present but the space and design are the clear focus.

Close-up of a cappuccino in a white branded cup on a saucer, occupying the foreground. Background is heavily blurred showing a bar with stools and chairs, making the space secondary to the drink product.
Clear interior with concrete walls, exposed ceiling beams, warm pendant lighting, wooden tables and chairs, large windows showing street view, empty of crowds.

Top-down close-up of a breakfast spread (coffees, croissants, bagels, egg sandwich, cheesecake) dominates the frame; while two chairs and an interior wall are visible, the food is the clear subject, making this product-focused rather than a venue hero.
Café interior with leather seating, large windows, espresso cup branded 'TOSTADO' on a tray, conveying a warm, inviting atmosphere.
Clear daytime exterior facade shot of a 'Tostado Café Club' storefront with signage, glass doors, menu boards, and outdoor seating visible; dark brick and metal elements give an industrial feel.

Clear view into a cafe/bar interior with visible seating, counter, tiled bar front, pendant lighting, framed wall art, and a large green 'SAUVAGE' sign marking the entrance. Industrial-style metal diamond-plate bar and exposed ceiling elements contribute to the atmosphere. Customers and staff are present, but the spatial composition of the venue is the focus.

Close-up of plated food and drinks on a wooden table; the frame is dominated by dishes (toast, eggs, latte, juice) with only minor background context visible, making it a food product shot rather than a venue space.

Interior of a bakery/café with walls densely covered in framed art, posters, and vinyl records, warm pendant lighting, and a counter displaying breads and pastries in baskets with chalkboard price signs.
Close-up of a black metal shelf displaying various breads, cakes, and baked goods with handwritten labels; food items dominate the frame with no broader venue context.

Foreground dominated by coffee and pastry on a wooden table, with blurred cafe interior (wooden tables, bench seating, counter, and a person in background) visible behind. Suitable as atmosphere/ambience image rather than a clear hero interior.
Two latte/coffee cups with latte art on a wooden table, no broader venue space visible.
Clear interior of a cafe showing counter, pastry display, wood furniture and bright lighting.

Outdoor/semi-enclosed seating area with wicker chairs and bistro tables, wooden deck flooring, street view through glass, dominated by vehicles and parking lot reflection; lacks clear venue identity or branded hero composition.
Close-up of coffee and pastries on a dark table with a person's torso partially visible; food and drink dominate the frame, no venue space is shown.

Close-up of a glass pastry display case with cookies, croissants, and rolls; background shows a coffee shop interior with menu board and POS terminal, but the framing is dominated by baked goods rather than the space itself.
Foreground dominated by a hand holding a branded coffee cup, with the cafe's exterior facade and signage visible but secondary in the background. The subject is the product, not the space.

Well-lit restaurant interior with round wooden tables, green banquette seating, subway tile backsplash, large mirrors, and warm pendant and table lamp lighting creating a cozy, inviting dining atmosphere.
Close-up of a plated dish (beef Wellington slice with dumpling and jus) on a decorative plate; no venue space visible, food dominates the frame against a dark background.
Close-up of plated steak and side dish on a counter with bar tools; food dominates the frame and no broader venue space is shown.
Close-up of a single cocktail in a coupe glass with a rose petal garnish, set against a dark background on a white surface. Only the drink is shown, with no venue space visible.
Black-and-white interior of an empty restaurant with set tables, wine glasses, bench seating, wall chalkboards, and large front windows letting in bright daylight, creating a moody contrast.
Close-up of a plated dish with sauce being poured over fried food, garnished with greens and sesame. No venue space visible; background is heavily blurred showing only a hint of a person.
Clear exterior facade of 'Las Pizarras Bistrò' with dark blue/black painted wood, glass paned doors and windows, interior warmly lit showing tables and chalkboard menus visible through the glass.
Close-up of a plated steak meal with salad and chutney in the foreground, with a partially visible person (no face) and dim bar/restaurant background. Food is the dominant subject.
Close-up of plated pastries, tea leaves, cinnamon sticks, and chocolate on a marble surface with no visible venue or people.
Close-up of a cheeseburger with sesame bun, fries in a metal basket, and salad on a dark table; no venue interior or people visible.
Elegant restaurant interior with white-clothed tables, a decorative chandelier, wood-paneled walls, large plant, and warm ambient lighting; one staff member is visible on the right.

Elegant interior with ornate crystal chandelier, classical wall paneling, parquet flooring, and round tables set with white linens; foreground drinks on a table in soft natural light create a warm, refined atmosphere.
Close-up of a plate with empanadas/pastries, a pink drink, and dipping sauce dominates the frame; interior background is heavily blurred and not the subject.
Interior of a bar/cafe with ornate chandeliers, terracotta walls, wooden bar, bottles on shelves, and dining seating clearly visible in warm lighting.
Close-up of cakes, cheesecakes, and orange juice bottles inside a refrigerated display case; no people or broader venue space visible.

Nighttime street view of an orange-facade building with a lit neon sign 'ANTIGUEDADES', decorative columns, wrought-iron balcony, chandelier visible inside, and outdoor café tables and woven chairs on the sidewalk.

Interior view of a dimly lit, intimate bar/restaurant with red ambient lighting, crystal chandelier, wood display cabinets with bottles, white-clothed tables set with candles and glassware, and a bartender working behind the counter.
Close-up of plated food (seared scallops over risotto) on a blue-patterned plate, with a second dish and lit candle in background; no visible space, architecture, or venue context.

Close-up overhead view of plated food (grilled fish/pork with sauce and cilantro on blue floral plate), a bowl of risotto, a cocktail, and a candle on a white tablecloth; no broader venue space visible.

Spacious, upscale restaurant interior with a dramatic glass atrium ceiling, polished marble floors, white-clothed tables, and warm lamp lighting. No people are visible, and the layout is clearly presented.
Close-up of plated food (salad with salmon, garnished dish) on a dining table; no clear view of the venue's interior space or atmosphere.

Well-lit interior showing dining tables, buffet counters with chafing dishes, string curtain partitions, recessed ceiling lights, and a visible bar area in the background, conveying a warm, refined restaurant atmosphere.
Close-up of a plated dessert with piped cream, garnish, coffee cup, and wine glass on a table; food and tableware dominate the frame with a heavily blurred background.
Grand interior with crystal chandelier, polished marble floors, gold-toned walls, and an ornate table with floral arrangements; spacious, well-lit, and suitable as a hero shot.
Close-up of a plated food item (smoked salmon with cheese and raisins) on decorative china with silverware, no broader venue space visible.

Dimly lit restaurant interior with wooden tables set with glassware, pendant lights, large windows showing street view, potted plants, and exposed concrete ceiling creating a moody, intimate atmosphere.

Dimly lit restaurant interior with exposed brick walls, wooden ceiling, and multiple tables. A large out-of-focus candle in the foreground blocks part of the view, and the overall lighting is very low, making it unsuitable as a hero image but conveying a dark, intimate ambience.
Close-up of a plated meal (breaded cutlet, pasta with cheese, lemon wedges) on a wooden table; the food dominates the frame and the background is out of focus.

Clear interior shot of a private dining area with a large wooden communal table, eight Windsor-style chairs, three terracotta pendant lights, and wooden venetian blinds. Warm ambient lighting and lush greenery create a cozy, inviting atmosphere suitable as a hero image.
Close-up overhead view dominated by plates of fried appetizers, empanadas, and croquettes on a wooden table; no architectural or spatial venue features visible.

Curved, multi-tiered bar backlit with warm lighting displaying a wide variety of liquor bottles and glassware, evoking a cozy, upscale lounge atmosphere.

Illuminated 'CAVE CANEM' sign mounted on an exposed brick wall with directional spotlights, functioning as a venue logo/identity shot rather than a full interior view.
Close-up of a pizza topped with arugula and olives on a plate; the venue interior is not the focus and no spatial context is shown.
Tightly framed close-up of a single gin-and-tonic–style cocktail with cucumber and lemon garnish. Background is a dark, riveted metal surface, providing mood but no spatial context of the venue.
Nighttime outdoor seating with a table setting in foreground, dimly lit restaurant interior visible in background, overall low light and noisy

Nighttime exterior of a corner building with illuminated bar/restaurant, warm red-orange interior lighting, outdoor seating with patrons, and visible street corner. Clear facade and entrance suitable as a hero exterior shot, though slightly dark overall.
Close-up of a cheese pull from a baked skillet dish, bread, and a cocktail glass on a table; food and drink dominate the frame with no clear view of the venue space.

Two dessert dishes in white bowls on a dark granite surface; food is the sole subject with no surrounding venue context.
Cozy lounge interior with red sofas, small tables, warm dim lighting from candles and globe sconces, textured ceiling tiles, and a decorative window with wrought iron.

Image is dominated by food and drink on a small orange table, with partial views of two people on the edges. Low lighting with warm table lamp suggests intimate atmosphere, but food is the clear subject.
Nighttime view through a large archway into a warmly lit bar with illuminated backlit bottle shelves, bar seating with patrons, and a dim ambient exterior seating area in the foreground.

Close-up of three drinks on a dark marble bar top; bar interior is blurred in background with a partial, out-of-focus person visible. Drinks dominate the frame, making it a product/food shot rather than a venue hero.
Well-lit bar interior with a marble countertop, backlit shelves of liquor bottles, bar stools, and dark wood flooring under low ambient lighting, creating an intimate speakeasy atmosphere.

Foreground dominated by a cocktail glass with ice and garnish, with bottle and decanter also in focus; the bar backdrop with liquor shelves is present but secondary and blurred, making the drink the clear subject.
Outdoor evening venue with many people seated at tables under awnings with string lights; identifiable faces of patrons dominate the frame, making it a crowd scene rather than a hero shot.

Close-up of wine glasses, candle, and cheese on a tray with moody, dim lighting and pink/red ambient tones. Foreground objects dominate; broader venue space is not clearly shown, making it atmospheric rather than a hero interior shot.
Image shows multiple wine bottles arranged on white shelves with handwritten price tags, no visible people, seating, or broader venue context. Dominated entirely by product display.
Close-up of three wine/beverage bottles on a table; venue background is heavily blurred and out of focus, making the bottles the sole clear subject.
Close-up of two branded drinking cups (Fernet Branca and Diesel Red) on a bar mat with bottles blurred in the background; no people or broader venue space visible.

Industrial warehouse interior heavily saturated in red lighting with heavy graffiti, exposed steel trusses, hanging fabric, rugs, tires, and lounge seating; the extreme red cast obscures true colors and detail, making it less ideal as a hero shot.

A group of people dominates the frame, gathered around a table with lit candles and smoke. The industrial/warehouse interior with red lighting and graffiti is visible in the background, but identifiable faces and the crowd activity make it a crowd shot rather than a clean hero interior.

Dark red-lit interior with a DJ/performer's face visible, crowd silhouettes in foreground, graffiti-style wall art, ceiling fan, and skull decorations; venue is dim with motion blur on the crowd, making it an atmospheric shot rather than a clean hero interior.

Clear exterior view of venue entrance featuring ornate wrought iron gates, a wooden-framed glass door, warm interior lighting visible through windows, and a 'SOCIAL PARAÍSO' sign, suggesting an upscale, cozy atmosphere.
Top-down close-up of a plated fish dish with orange sauce, crispy garnish, and green pesto on a white plate; no venue space visible.
Clear interior view of a bar with hanging greenery, pendant lights, tiled bar front, shelving with bottles, and bar stools; well-lit and in focus.

Bar interior with marble counter, red diamond-patterned paneling, pendant globe lights, shelves of bottles in background, and a bartender in branded shirt preparing a smoked cocktail with visible dry ice vapor and a garnished drink on the counter.

Close-up of fried calamari rings on a white plate dominates the frame, with a small glass of pale sauce and a blurred person in a white shirt in the background. The focus is entirely on the food product rather than the venue interior.

Close-up of a single cocktail glass on a wooden tray with coffee beans, resting on a dark marble surface. Only the drink and its immediate garnish/presentation are visible, with no broader venue context.
Close-up of a cocktail glass with ice, heavily blurred background showing indistinct warm lights, no spatial context visible.
Dark wood-paneled lounge with tufted leather sofas, velvet chairs, warm table lamp glow, and floral arrangements conveying an upscale, intimate atmosphere.

Sharp, well-lit bar interior with black marble counter, wood-paneled ceiling, backlit liquor shelves, brass accents, and a single small background figure; clear spatial composition suitable as a hero shot.
Close-up of a plated dish with raw fish, garnishes, and a small bottle of liquid on a white plate; no venue interior or spatial context is visible.
Close-up of a plated dish with raw fish, charred corn, avocado, radish, and crispy garnish in a dark bowl. No venue space, people, or architectural elements are visible.
Close-up of a plated food dish with sauce, garnishes, and onion rings on a white plate; no venue interior or spatial context visible.

Well-lit interior of a restaurant featuring wooden tables, chairs, and decorative slatted walls. Warm, dim ambient lighting with a clearly visible dining space and open kitchen area in the background.

Nighttime cityscape view from an elevated vantage point showing a river, illuminated city skyline with a prominent red-lit tower, and a warmly lit floating riverside venue with string lights and crowds below, framed by a red railing in the foreground.
Wide interior shot of a well-lit bar with extensive backlit liquor shelves, neon Stella Artois sign, pendant lighting, bar seating, and patrons clearly showing the venue's warm, upscale atmosphere.
Close-up of multiple cocktails on a dark table with a small lamp; no clear view of the room or venue space, dominated by drinks.

Rooftop bar scene at dusk with neon 'ALVEAR ROOFBAR' sign, pergola columns, and wicker chairs around marble tables. Multiple people are visible in the mid-ground and right side, and a partial person is cropped in the right foreground, reducing hero usability.

Nighttime exterior view of a bar entrance with arched doorway, pink neon 'Alvear Roof Bar' sign, open double doors revealing a warmly lit interior with a bar counter and stools. Clear architectural facade shot.

Outdoor rooftop dining table at dusk with candles, glassware, marble surface, string lights, and deep blue evening sky creating an intimate atmosphere; the table setting dominates the frame rather than a clear view of the venue space.
Close-up of a sushi platter with various rolls, nigiri, garnishes, and sauces; no venue space, people, or architectural details are visible.
Close-up of grilled sausages on a metal tray and yellow food items on a wire rack; background is heavily blurred with bokeh lights, no discernible room or venue architecture.

Intimate performance venue interior with stage, dramatic blue/white spotlights, brick backdrop, and seated audience at small tables. Strong venue character but performers and audience prevent use as pure hero.
Clear exterior facade of a shop with large wooden-framed windows, open wooden door revealing bottle shelves inside, street number visible, and tree reflections on glass in bright daylight.

Dimly lit interior with warm amber lighting, wooden tables, leather seating, and visible dining area in background; foreground dominated by plated food (peas on ricotta, focaccia) and wine glass, making it a food-first composition rather than a clean hero shot of the space.

A wine glass with golden beverage dominates the foreground in sharp focus, while the interior venue (wooden tables, bar with bottles, metal chairs) is visible but heavily blurred in the background. Subject is a drink, not the space.

Close-up of a meal (meat dish and kale) with wine and water on a wooden bar/table; the food and drink dominate the frame, with only a blurred window view in the background. No clear interior space is shown.

Top-down shot of a single dessert tart with meringue and raspberries on a white plate over a beige linen background. No venue interior, people, or architectural elements are visible.

Close-up of a plated meat dish on a stoneware plate dominates the frame, with wine glasses and bar bottles softly blurred in the background. The focus is on the food rather than the venue space.

Outdoor patio dining area with black-and-white woven bistro chairs, round tables set with plates and glassware, warm wooden decking, surrounded by dense green hedges and tropical plants, illuminated by warm golden-hour sunlight under awnings.
Close-up of a plated dessert (round, textured mousse-like sphere with gold leaf) on a decorated plate; no venue interior, no people, no spatial context visible.
Outdoor patio seating with peach umbrellas, striped cushions, brick pavers, abundant greenery, and flowering plants, with a partial view of adjacent building and steps.
Sunlit garden courtyard with manicured hedges, flowering plants, palm trees, and a brick pathway leading toward a glass-roofed structure, with a set dining table in the foreground.
Clear exterior facade shot of 'BAUTISTA BAR & CAFE' with blue awning, signage, and visible storefront windows on a corner building under bright daylight.

View from a low angle across a wooden table inside a cafe; a person in a hoodie sits at the counter, a staff member works at an espresso machine, and a pastry display case is visible. Wide interior shot of a cafe/food hall with industrial pendant lighting, exposed concrete ceiling, multiple seating zones, plants, and patrons. Good ambient view but cluttered composition with partial views and no clear focal point, making it less ideal as a hero image.

Clear view of an ornate cafe/bar interior with dark wood paneling, brass fixtures, marble floor, chandeliers, and ambient warm lighting, suitable as a hero image.

Clear, well-lit interior of an upscale café/bar with ornate wood paneling, marble tables, brass railings, glassware, and decorative wall portraits, conveying a classic warm and cozy European ambiance.
Close-up of plates with scrambled eggs, bacon, toast, coffee, and orange juice; no visible space, architecture, or people.

Long interior shot showing ornate coffered ceiling, dark wood paneling, red patterned wallpaper, leather booths, cane-back chairs with red cushions, marble tables, and a fully stocked bar in the distance. Warm amber lighting creates a cozy, classic European café/brasserie atmosphere.
Nighttime exterior view of an ornate facade with a lit outdoor patio filled with seated diners, clear architectural details, and warm ambient lighting.

Close-up overhead shot of sandwiches on a plate, a glass of red sangria, and spring rolls with dipping sauce on a dark table. Only food and beverages are visible; no venue space, decor, or people are shown.

Close-up of a plated burger with crispy chips and microgreens on a dark plate, set on a woven rattan surface with tropical foliage in the background. Food dominates the frame with no venue interior or seating visible.

Clear, well-lit hotel bedroom interior with a neatly made bed, bedside lamps, framed wall art, sheer curtains letting in natural light, and a modern armchair and chair visible in the seating area.

Clear evening exterior shot of a cafe ('BORJA') facade with warm interior lighting visible through large windows, outdoor seating with patrons, and a defined storefront entrance.

Clear exterior facade shot of 'The Coffee Store' with large glass windows, visible signage 'WE ARE COFFEE BELIEVERS', outdoor seating with black metal tables and chairs, and a modern dark gray storefront with brick upper level. Good daylight and sharp focus.

Overhead close-up of a table with coffee, croissants, chocolate cake, and juice; the venue's space is not visible.
Close-up of a shared dish with burrata, prosciutto, and chutney in a pan, accompanied by wine glasses and a bottle on a granite table. Focus is on food and drink, not the surrounding venue space.

Foreground dominated by a wine glass in soft focus on a reflective bar surface; background shows a dimly lit plaza with empty chairs, planters, and historic buildings viewed through a window, prioritizing ambience over a clear venue interior.

Nighttime street scene where numerous identifiable people dominate the frame, gathered outside a venue with a chalkboard sign on a cobblestone street, making it more of a crowd shot than a clear hero image.
